query:
DELETE cp FROM contactPhones cp
INNER JOIN (
  SELECT cp2.id
  FROM contactPhones cp2
  INNER JOIN contacts c ON cp2.contactId = c.id
  WHERE c.propertyId IS NOT NULL
  AND cp2.id NOT IN (
    SELECT MIN(cp3.id)
    FROM contactPhones cp3
    INNER JOIN contacts c2 ON cp3.contactId = c2.id
    WHERE c2.propertyId IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY cp3.phoneNumber, c2.propertyId
  )
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM contactPhones cp4
    INNER JOIN contacts c3 ON cp4.contactId = c3.id
    WHERE cp4.phoneNumber = cp2.phoneNumber
    AND c3.propertyId = c.propertyId
    AND cp4.id < cp2.id
  )
) AS dups ON cp.id = dups.id;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2HoMEWBM6m36fKT.7b334260735d --database RDbAfwHQBDqo37pina3pDu --execute DELETE cp FROM contactPhones cp
INNER JOIN (
  SELECT cp2.id
  FROM contactPhones cp2
  INNER JOIN contacts c ON cp2.contactId = c.id
  WHERE c.propertyId IS NOT NULL
  AND cp2.id NOT IN (
    SELECT MIN(cp3.id)
    FROM contactPhones cp3
    INNER JOIN contacts c2 ON cp3.contactId = c2.id
    WHERE c2.propertyId IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY cp3.phoneNumber, c2.propertyId
  )
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM contactPhones cp4
    INNER JOIN contacts c3 ON cp4.contactId = c3.id
    WHERE cp4.phoneNumber = cp2.phoneNumber
    AND c3.propertyId = c.propertyId
    AND cp4.id < cp2.id
  )
) AS dups ON cp.id = dups.id;
